case_for: Woods has shown occasional spikes in target share that could theoretically produce a big play or two if the offensive game script favors garbage-time targets, but there's little evidence supporting a major role change.
case_against: His recent usage has been consistently low, with a season-long trend of minimal production (all six recent games under 6.5 points) and a pregame projection of just 3.3 points, indicating a marginal role in the offense.
